policy: Draft and propose only. No skill may mutate ERP or external systems without explicit human approval.

skills.label: Build estimate draft
skills.description: Draft a Benson estimate from approved scope, quantities, cost sources, and markup policy.

skills.label: Compare historical costs
skills.description: Compare line items with Benson historical costs without inventing missing rates.

skills.label: Review quantity takeoff
skills.description: Extract and validate draft quantities from approved project documents.

skills.label: Draft value options
skills.description: Propose scope alternatives with explicit cost, schedule, and quality tradeoffs.

skills.label: Draft change order
skills.description: Draft documented cost and schedule impacts for a proposed change.

skills.label: Analyze budget variance
skills.description: Compare approved budget, commitments, and QuickBooks actuals.

skills.label: Forecast project cash flow
skills.description: Draft a cash-flow forecast from approved schedule and QuickBooks facts.

skills.label: Draft look-ahead schedule
skills.description: Propose a short-horizon schedule from constraints, crews, materials, and commitments.

skills.label: Analyze critical path
skills.description: Identify schedule constraints and proposed recovery actions.

skills.label: Review weather impacts
skills.description: Flag weather-sensitive work using project location and verified forecast data.

skills.label: Draft daily report
skills.description: Turn field notes, time, deliveries, and photos into a reviewable daily report.

skills.label: Organize progress photos
skills.description: Classify project photos and flag uncertain observations for human review.

skills.label: Draft punch list
skills.description: Create and organize proposed punch items from inspected facts and photos.

skills.label: Draft safety inspection
skills.description: Structure observations without replacing competent-person safety judgment.

skills.label: Review material procurement
skills.description: Summarize approved material needs, orders, lead times, and delivery risks.

skills.label: Compare supplier and trade bids
skills.description: Normalize bid scope and identify exclusions, alternates, and comparison gaps.

skills.label: Draft payment request
skills.description: Draft a customer payment request from approved progress and billing policy.

skills.label: Track lien waivers
skills.description: Track waiver status and missing documents without providing legal advice.

skills.label: Review contract clauses
skills.description: Extract and flag clauses for owner or counsel review without legal conclusions.

skills.label: Draft meeting minutes
skills.description: Draft decisions, assignments, and unresolved questions from meeting notes.

skills.label: Review closeout readiness
skills.description: Check required Benson closeout records and flag missing evidence.

skills.label: Review warranties
skills.description: Summarize warranty dates, obligations, documents, and upcoming follow-up.

skills.label: Extract construction documents
skills.description: Extract structured draft data with source references and confidence flags.

skills.label: Run construction security review
skills.description: Review ERP and integration changes against construction-specific security controls.

skills.label: Verify construction deliverable
skills.description: Check data integrity, business rules, evidence, and output quality before delivery.
